title: [CalyxToHW] convertPipelineOp passes i1 clock to seq registers instead of ClockType
body:
`convertPipelineOp` in `CalyxToHW.cpp` passes the `i1` clock wire directly to `reg()` and `regCe()`, which create `seq::CompRegOp` and `seq::CompRegClockEnabledOp`. These ops require `seq::ClockType`, not `i1`.

The `RegisterOp` case in the same file was fixed in #6139 to use `seq::ToClockOp` for this conversion, but `convertPipelineOp` was missed.

Affected ops: `MultPipeLibOp`, `DivUPipeLibOp`, `DivSPipeLibOp`, `RemSPipeLibOp`, `RemUPipeLibOp`.

PR: #9715
